query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector,
  COUNT(c.id) AS namedUnverified
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, namedUnverified DESC;
